_meta.description: Default seed data for the template module. Each top-level key is a table name from Schema.json. The value is an array of row objects whose keys match the column names. Loaded via POST /api/<moduleId>/data/defaults. Uses ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING so it is safe to run multiple times.

template_items.name: Welcome Item
template_items.description: Auto-seeded by DefaultData.json when the user clicks 'Load Default Data' in the Data Management settings tab.

template_items.name: Example Configuration
template_items.description: Another seed row — add as many as your module needs. Each row is inserted in a single transaction.
